name: @knolo/core
description: Local-first knowledge packs for small LLMs.
author: Sam Paniagua

scripts.test: npm run build && node scripts/check-runtime-no-node.mjs && node scripts/test.mjs
scripts.format: prettier --write src/agent.ts src/pack.ts src/pack.runtime.ts src/pack.node.ts src/node.ts src/builder.ts src/index.ts scripts/test.mjs scripts/check-runtime-no-node.mjs ../../README.md README.md
scripts.format:check: prettier --check src/agent.ts src/pack.ts src/pack.runtime.ts src/pack.node.ts src/node.ts src/builder.ts src/index.ts scripts/test.mjs scripts/check-runtime-no-node.mjs ../../README.md README.md
